channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cannabis leaves contain potential medical compounds
item.description: Researchers have identified several previously unknown compounds in cannabis leaves, including a novel discovery.

item.title: Study clarifies fat metabolism
item.description: Researchers have identified a protein influencing fat metabolism, which may impact current scientific understanding.

item.title: Study Questions Link Between Water Intake and Kidney Stones
item.description: Researchers investigated whether increased water consumption reduces the recurrence of kidney stones.

item.title: Research Explains Formation of the Twelve Apostles
item.description: A new study details the geological processes behind Australia’s Twelve Apostles, linking them to tectonic shifts and seabed uplift.
